name: timecell-plugins
description: Family office intelligence plugins — AI CIO for net worth, allocation, Bitcoin, estate planning, and Indian mutual funds

plugins.name: timecell
plugins.description: Family Office OS — your AI CIO. Net worth tracking, allocation analysis, guardrails, and financial planning.

plugins.name: timecell-bitcoin
plugins.description: Bitcoin CIO intelligence — temperature, selling ladder, crash survival, hedge engine, conviction framework. Requires timecell core.

plugins.name: timecell-indian-mf
plugins.description: Indian mutual fund intelligence — SEBI classification, NAV tracking, underperformer detection, SIP/XIRR, Zerodha integration. Requires timecell core.

plugins.name: timecell-estate
plugins.description: Estate planning, succession, trust tracking, key packages, custody audit, document registry. Requires timecell core.
